CVE-2012-5662.title: x3270 before 3.3.12ga12 does not verify that the server hostname  ...
CVE-2012-5662.description: x3270 before 3.3.12ga12 does not verify that the server hostname matches a domain name in the subject's Common Name (CN) or subjectAltName field of the X.509 certificate, which allows man-in-the-middle attackers to spoof SSL servers via an arbitrary valid certificate.
